method_notes: Plausible-circa-April-2026 Korean political topics, hand-curated to demonstrate the rank-change UI before live capture is wired up. Replaced automatically once `npm run salience:capture` runs.

topics.summary: Approaching the one-year mark of the Lee administration. Polling and op-eds focus on prosecution reform progress and economic management.
DPK and PPP finalizing nominees for Seoul mayor and gubernatorial races; primary disputes within DPK over Seoul candidate selection.
Hearings continuing in the criminal trial following December 2024 martial law declaration; new witness testimony scheduled.
Reports of weekend missile test by North Korea; defense ministry holding emergency briefing.
Apartment prices in Seoul again ticking upward; opposition criticizing Lee administration's anti-speculation measures as ineffective.
Interim leadership in flux ahead of the 9th Local Elections; internal debate over the post-Yoon party direction.
Renewed friction over auto and semiconductor tariffs under second Trump administration; trade ministry working-level visit to Washington.
Procedural disputes between candidate factions in several Seoul gu primaries; appeals being filed with the central committee.
